issue.message: Limit vector icons sizes to 200×200 to keep icon drawing fast; see https://developer.android.com/studio/write/vector-asset-studio#when for more
Very long vector path (4047 characters), which is bad for performance. Considering reducing precision, removing minor details or rasterizing vector.
Very long vector path (22182 characters), which is bad for performance. Considering reducing precision, removing minor details or rasterizing vector.
The application adaptive icon is missing a monochrome tag
The application adaptive roundIcon is missing a monochrome tag
